summary: Iteration 15 frontend-only verification of the new Courses + reviews UI. Two fresh TEST_i15ui_* users signed up via the live Signup UI, name set during signup so OnboardingGate skipped to photo step (Skip used). All 30+ acceptance checks PASSED: (1) nav-courses link present, positioned BETWEEN nav-bagcheck and nav-discovery (x=850 < 957 < 1045). (2) /courses renders courses-view with courses-search input and 15 course-card-{id} entries. (3) Exactly 10 course-ace-club-{id} pills shown — matches spec (Maple Hill, Idlewild, Winthrop Gold, DeLaveaga, Flip City, Beaver Ranch, Milo McIver East, Renaissance Park, Fountain Hills, Sabattus). Pill format '🏆 Ace Club (N)' verified (e.g. (250), (200), (90)). Northwood (aceClub=false) has NO pill. (4) courses-recent-reviews sidebar visible with the seeded 'Alice i15 / Beaver Ranch' review. (5) Debounced search (250ms): 'Maple' → 1 card after 450ms wait, 'Northwood' → 1 card, 'xyz_no_match_query' → courses-empty state with the typed string echoed. (6) Clicking a card navigates to /courses/{id} → course-detail-view loads. course-name='Maple Hill', course-ace-club-badge='🏆 Ace Club (250)', holes shown. (7) course-review-form rendered. Star picker testids course-review-star-1..5 work. Submit (course-review-submit) DISABLED at start, DISABLED after stars only (empty body), ENABLED after stars + body. (8) POST review → course-reviews-list shows new entry at top with star rating + body, course-review-delete-{id} button visible on the user's own review, header avg_rating updated to ★★★★★ (1 review). (9) Second submit by same user REPLACES the first — only 1 item in course-reviews-list, original body gone, header still '(1 review)' confirming upsert. (10) course-back-link navigates back to /courses; sidebar recent-reviews now contains author 'Course Tester2' + 'Maple Hill' + 'Updated take' excerpt + star rating, confirming /api/courses/recent-reviews includes course_name + author + body. (11) OnboardingGate still mounts above /courses (verified via photo-step Skip happening before nav-courses was reachable).
critical_code_review_comments: Courses.jsx (188 lines) — clean. Debounced search via 250ms setTimeout in effect runs an initial extra fetch on mount (Promise.all also fetches once, then the search effect fires another fetchCourses('') after 250ms). Harmless duplicate request but worth a follow-up if traffic matters.

CourseDetail.jsx (251 lines) — replace-on-resubmit is done client-side by filtering same-author reviews before prepending; backend upsert is the source of truth (confirmed: review count stays at 1 after second submit). Good belt+suspenders.
CourseDetail.jsx handleSubmit re-fetches the full course after each POST/delete to refresh avg_rating + review_count instead of computing locally — correct choice since backend is authoritative.

StarPicker buttons have data-testid course-review-star-{n} and aria-labels. Submit button correctly disabled via `rating < 1 || !body.trim()` (matches spec exactly). Disabled style uses Tailwind disabled:opacity-50 — visible affordance.
Recent-review row links to /players/{uid} and /courses/{id} — minor accessibility nit: outer <li> isn't a single link target, but the two inner Links cover the important nav. No fix needed.
Empty state copy uses smart quotes via “ / ” — renders correctly in browser.
Pill styling: bg-disc-gold/15 + text-disc-gold + border-disc-gold/40 — readable contrast on white card. Detail-page badge is a slightly larger variant (text-sm vs text-xs) — consistent.
Holes upper bound bumped to 99 per spec (Sabattus = 54) — list rendered fine, no clipping.

success_rate.backend: n/a (backend tested by main agent: 6/6 green in test_iteration15.py)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (30+/30+ checks across courses list, detail, reviews, ace-club badge, recent-reviews sidebar, search debounce, replace-on-resubmit, back-link)

test_credentials: Two fresh users created in-test via the live /signup UI: TEST_i15ui_9b460737@example.com and TEST_i15ui_f6e48e33@example.com (password demo1234). Names 'Course Tester' / 'Course Tester2'. Not explicitly deleted at end-of-run — Firebase delete via id_token would require capturing the token, and the existing pattern is in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration12.py if cleanup is needed. These users are dev-mode only.
seed_data_creation: Each user posted then replaced one review on Maple Hill (R8OSItD-7z4). Final state: course has 1 review per test user → Maple Hill should now show ~2 reviews from i15 testers. recent-reviews sidebar will surface them. No fixtures created beyond reviews.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Courses iteration is complete. Routes /courses and /courses/:id are authed-only. Key testids: nav-courses, courses-view, courses-search, courses-empty, course-card-{id}, course-ace-club-{id}, courses-recent-reviews, recent-review-{id}, course-detail-view, course-name, course-ace-club-badge, course-avg-rating, course-back-link, course-review-form, course-review-star-{1..5}, course-review-input, course-review-submit, course-review-error, course-reviews-list, course-review-{id}, course-review-delete-{id}. Seeded course set is exactly 15 (10 with aceClub=true). One-review-per-user upsert is enforced on backend AND mirrored in the UI by filtering same-author reviews on submit. Debounce is 250ms — wait >=450ms before re-querying. Maple Hill course id observed in this run: 'R8OSItD-7z4' (slug-based).
